'''''Nexu''''' was a [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] that served as a [[Troop transport/Legends|troop transport]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
The [[Warship/Legends|warship]] was placed under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Arikakon Baraka]]. [[CT-9/85]] served as its communications [[Technician/Legends|technician]]. The ship was used during training exercises on [[Vandor-3]] in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], then sent to [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] to threaten the planet's leaders. During this [[Mission to Ord Cestus|mission]], the ship targeted the bunker where the leaders of the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Five Families]] were hiding and destroyed it.

==Behind the scenes==
While ''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' describes the ''Nexu'' as a "supercruiser", ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' established the ship to be an ''Acclamator''-class.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
